prompt: Fun one from CI this morning: when the runner enqueues two builds back to back, the FIRST job's command line comes out pointing at the SECOND job. The launch log for compile-api literally reads `runc --quiet --sandbox --job compile-web` — it picked up the other job's name, and any per-job flags we passed for the first job are gone too. Run a single job and everything is perfect, which is why this sat unnoticed for weeks. It has to be somewhere in jobargs.go. Fix it and prove it with `go test -race -timeout 30s ./...` — jobargs_test.go must not be modified.
